untranslatable_reason: Signal requires monitoring strategy-level profitability metrics (45-day historical returns vs 15-day current returns, profit compression tracking, competitive advantage erosion) which are meta-strategy analytics outside the scope of price/volume-based technical indicators. The core logic requires comparing rolling profit windows and compression ratios that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume indicators. This is a regime detection signal requiring custom portfolio analytics, not a tradeable entry/exit rule.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a market regime identifier about strategy decay due to competition, not a traditional entry/exit signal. It requires: (1) measurement of strategy alpha decay over time, (2) tracking of baseline profitability windows, (3) competitive pressure quantification. These require live P&L data and strategy performance history rather than price/technical analysis. The allowed indicators cannot synthesize 'competitive entry erosion' or 'structural advantage' metrics. Recommend implementing as a meta-analysis overlay outside the backtest engine.
